steps.t: Thorzhaf can be found in Talath Úrui. You should enter Thorzhaf.
Thorzhaf can be found in Talath Úrui. You should find a suitable Orc blade to steal in Thorzhaf.
Maukatish can be found at Thorzhaf. You should speak with Maukatish about signing up to participate in the pit-fighting tournament.
